# Knurl Mastering
> Professional audio mastering studio operated by Miguel Pinheiro Marques and Clara Araújo. Based in Baltar (Porto), Portugal, specializing in premium analog and digital mastering for global artists, labels, and independent musicians.

## Core Services
- [Stereo Mastering (PT)](/pt/) / [Stereo Mastering (EN)](/en/): High-end final stereo audio processing optimized for streaming platforms, CD, and high-resolution digital distribution.
- [Dolby Atmos & Immersive Mastering](/en/): Professional spatial audio mastering for immersive formats, ensuring translation and impact across Dolby Atmos-enabled playback systems.
- [Stem Mastering](/en/): Advanced audio mastering working from separated instrument groups (stems) to maximize mix balance, headroom, and punch.
- [Vinyl Pre-Mastering](/en/): Specialized, technical audio preparation respecting physical disc-cutting limitations.

## Industry Expertise & Collaborations
- **Immersive Audio:** Extensive experience in **Dolby Atmos** mastering workflows and immersive content delivery for digital platforms.
- **DSP & Plugin Development:** Miguel Pinheiro Marques collaborated with **Eventide / Newfangled Audio** on the development of the **Fixate:Midrange** plugin, contributing engineering expertise to modern mastering tools.

## Technical Infrastructure & Gear
Our technical approach balances a dedicated analog path with high-precision digital tools.
- **Analog Outboard:** Specialized boutique processors by **Gyraf Audio**, focusing on musicality, character, and dynamic integrity for mastering.
- **Monitoring:** **PMC 8-2 XBD** precision monitoring system in a critically tuned environment for absolute translation and high-resolution detail.
- **Digital Processing:** High-end digital suite featuring **Newfangled Audio**, **Goodhertz**, and **Weiss** (Softube) for transparent and surgically precise mastering.
- **Mastering Workflows:** Deep integration with modern hybrid mastering workflows, including high-resolution digital and premium analog processing.

## Studio Location & Identity
- **Headquarters / Technical Room:** Baltar, Porto, Portugal.
- **Legal Entity:** Operated by Miguel Pinheiro Marques
- **Fiscal Identification (NIF):** 220270694.
- **Official Contact Email:** info@knurlmastering.com
